Title: Verify adding a beneficiary with valid account number and IFSC
Precondition: User is logged in and on Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary screen
Step 2: Enter a valid account number (123456789012)
Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code (ABCD0123456)
Step 4: Click the 'Add Beneficiary' button
Step 5: Observe the success notification
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added successfully and a success message is displayed

Title: Verify transferring money within allowed limits with correct OTP
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the previously added beneficiary
Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 5000
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' to trigger OTP
Step 4: Enter the correct OTP received (123456)
Step 5: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 6: Verify confirmation message is shown
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed successfully and confirmation message is displayed

Title: Verify success message is displayed after a completed transfer
Precondition: User has just completed a successful transfer
Steps:
Step 1: Observe the UI after confirming the transfer
Step 2: Locate the notification area
Step 3: Read the displayed message
Expected_Result: Message 'Transfer successful' (or equivalent) is shown to the user

Title: Verify error when adding beneficiary with invalid account number format
Precondition: User is logged in and on Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary screen
Step 2: Enter an invalid account number (ABC123)
Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code (ABCD0123456)
Step 4: Click the 'Add Beneficiary' button
Step 5: Observe validation error
Expected_Result: System shows validation error stating account number must be numeric and 10‑16 digits

Title: Verify error when transfer amount exceeds the maximum limit
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select a beneficiary
Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 150000 (exceeds ₹1,00,000 limit)
Step 3: Click 'Proceed'
Step 4: Observe validation response
Expected_Result: System blocks the transfer and displays an error about exceeding the allowed limit

Title: Verify transfer of the minimum allowed amount succeeds
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the beneficiary
Step 2: Enter the minimum transfer amount of 1
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' and enter correct OTP (123456)
Step 4: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 5: Verify success notification
Expected_Result: Transfer of ₹1 is processed successfully and confirmation message appears

Title: Verify OTP verification blocks transfer when OTP is incorrect
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the beneficiary
Step 2: Enter a valid transfer amount (5000)
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' to request OTP
Step 4: Enter an incorrect OTP (000000)
Step 5: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 6: Observe error message
Expected_Result: Transfer is not completed and an error message indicating invalid OTP is displayed

Title: Verify transaction history API returns the recent transfer record
Precondition: A successful transfer has been made earlier in the session
Steps:
Step 1: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=USER123
Step 2: Receive JSON response
Step 3: Validate that the latest entry matches the recent transfer details (amount, beneficiary, status)
Expected_Result: API returns a list containing the newly created transaction with correct details and status 'Success'

Title: Verify user can add beneficiary with valid account number and IFSC
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to the Beneficiary Management section
Step 2: Click on 'Add Beneficiary' button
Step 3: Enter a valid account number (1234567890)
Step 4: Enter a valid IFSC code (ABCD0123456)
Step 5: Click the 'Add' button
Step 6: Observe the success notification
Expected_Result: System shows success message and the new beneficiary appears in the beneficiary list

Title: Verify user can add beneficiary with maximum length account number (16 digits)
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Open Add Beneficiary form
Step 2: Input account number 1234567890123456
Step 3: Input IFSC code ABCD0123456
Step 4: Click 'Add'
Step 5: Verify success notification appears
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added successfully and displayed in the list

Title: Verify user can add beneficiary with valid alphanumeric IFSC code
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Open Add Beneficiary form
Step 2: Enter account number 9876543210
Step 3: Enter IFSC code XZYB0987654
Step 4: Click 'Add'
Step 5: Confirm success message is displayed
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added and listed with the provided IFSC

Title: Verify error message when account number contains non-numeric characters
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Open Add Beneficiary form
Step 2: Input account number '12AB567890'
Step 3: Input valid IFSC code ABCD0123456
Step 4: Click 'Add'
Step 5: Observe the validation error
Expected_Result: System displays error 'Account number must be numeric and 10‑16 digits long'

Title: Verify error when IFSC code format is invalid
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Open Add Beneficiary form
Step 2: Enter valid account number 1234567890
Step 3: Enter IFSC code 'ABC12' (less than 11 characters)
Step 4: Click 'Add'
Step 5: Check for validation message
Expected_Result: System shows error 'IFSC code must be 11 alphanumeric characters'

Title: Verify adding beneficiary at edge of allowed account number length and IFSC pattern
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Open Add Beneficiary form
Step 2: Input account number with exactly 10 digits '1000000000'
Step 3: Input IFSC code starting with numeric character '1BCD0123456'
Step 4: Click 'Add'
Step 5: Verify success notification
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added successfully, confirming edge values are accepted

Title: Verify unauthorized user cannot access Add Beneficiary API
Precondition: No authentication token is provided
Steps:
Step 1: Send POST request to /api/beneficiaries with valid payload
Step 2: Do not include Authorization header
Step 3: Observe HTTP response status
Step 4: Verify response body
Expected_Result: API returns 401 Unauthorized with error message 'Authentication required'

Title: Verify Add Beneficiary API returns success for valid request
Precondition: User has a valid authentication token
Steps:
Step 1: Send POST request to /api/beneficiaries with Authorization header
Step 2: Include JSON payload with account_number 1234567890 and ifsc ABCD0123456
Step 3: Capture HTTP response
Step 4: Validate response status and body
Expected_Result: API returns 201 Created with response body containing beneficiary ID and success message

Title: Verify successful transfer appears in transaction history
Precondition: User is logged in and has sufficient balance
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Transfer Money page
Step 2: Select a valid beneficiary
Step 3: Enter amount 1000 and click Proceed
Step 4: Enter correct OTP and confirm transfer
Step 5: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=USER123
Step 6: Validate the latest transaction record matches the transfer details
Expected_Result: Transfer completes successfully and the transaction appears as the most recent entry with status 'Success'

Title: Verify OTP verification allows transfer when OTP is correct

Step 2: Enter a valid transfer amount (5000)
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' to request OTP
Step 4: Enter the correct OTP (123456)
Step 5: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 6: Observe transfer success message
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed and a success confirmation is displayed

Title: Verify beneficiary can be added successfully
Precondition: User is logged in
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Beneficiary Management page
Step 2: Click 'Add Beneficiary'
Step 3: Fill in beneficiary details (name, account number, bank)
Step 4: Click 'Save'
Step 5: Verify beneficiary appears in the beneficiary list
Expected_Result: New beneficiary is saved and displayed in the list

Title: Verify transfer fails when balance is insufficient
Precondition: User is logged in with balance less than transfer amount
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Transfer Money page
Step 2: Select a beneficiary
Step 3: Enter amount 100000 (greater than available balance)
Step 4: Click 'Proceed'
Step 5: Observe error message
Expected_Result: Transfer is blocked and an error message 'Insufficient balance' is displayed

Title: Verify transaction history API returns error for invalid userId
Precondition: User is logged in
Steps:
Step 1: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=INVALID_USER
Step 2: Receive JSON response
Step 3: Validate response status code and error message
Expected_Result: API returns 400 Bad Request with error message 'Invalid userId'

Title: Verify transaction history API returns empty list when no transactions exist
Precondition: New user with no prior transfers
Steps:
Step 1: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=NEWUSER123
Step 2: Receive JSON response
Step 3: Validate that the returned transaction array is empty
Expected_Result: API returns an empty transaction list with status 200
